paper_title: Acquiring and Modelling Abstract Commonsense Knowledge via Conceptualization
failure_detail: Code has dependencies (atomic_parse_utils, build_exp_data, build_graph_utils, conceptualize_proposer, datasets, datasource, editdistance, inflect, lemminflect, lm_scorer (+18 more)) but no requirements file; env-like files found at unexpected paths: generator/requirements.txt, discriminator/requirements.txt, conceptualizer/requirements.txt
